name: Reports
description: Generates beautiful HTML system-activity reports with multi-agent review.
author: Fusion Team

dailyCron.label: Daily Schedule (cron)
dailyCron.description: Cron expression for daily report generation.

weeklyCron.label: Weekly Schedule (cron)
weeklyCron.description: Cron expression for weekly report generation.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone used for schedule evaluation.

generationPromptDaily.label: Daily Generation Prompt
generationPromptDaily.description: Prompt template used to generate daily reports.
generationPromptDaily.defaultValue: Summarize today's system activity with clear wins, highlights, lowlights, and proposals.

generationPromptWeekly.label: Weekly Generation Prompt
generationPromptWeekly.description: Prompt template used to generate weekly reports.
generationPromptWeekly.defaultValue: Summarize this week's system activity trends, major outcomes, and actionable proposals.

reviewPrompt.label: Review Prompt
reviewPrompt.description: Prompt template used by reviewer agents.
reviewPrompt.defaultValue: Review this report for factual accuracy, clarity, and actionability. Provide concrete revision suggestions.

reviewPanelAgentIds.label: Reviewer Agent IDs
reviewPanelAgentIds.description: Agent IDs allowed to review generated reports.

reviewMinApprovals.label: Minimum Approvals
reviewMinApprovals.description: How many approvals are required from the review panel.

reviewBlockingMode.label: Review Blocking Mode
reviewBlockingMode.description: Choose whether failed review blocks publication.

sectionOrder.label: Section Order
sectionOrder.description: Ordered section IDs for report rendering.

includeSystemSummary.label: Include System Summary
includeSystemSummary.description: Include top-level system summary in report output.

brandLogoUrl.label: Logo URL
brandLogoUrl.description: Optional URL to a brand logo image.

accentColor.label: Accent Color
accentColor.description: Accent color used in report styling.

autoPublishOnApproval.label: Auto Publish on Approval
autoPublishOnApproval.description: Publish automatically after approval threshold is met.

approverAgentIds.label: Approver Agent IDs
approverAgentIds.description: Agent IDs permitted to approve final publish.

publishTargets.label: Publish Targets
publishTargets.description: Destinations to publish reports to (for example dashboard, html-export).
